task_completion.description: Agent successfully logged into the Ekylibre application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Ekylibre dashboard or main interface is visible, indicating successful authentication.

task_completion.description: Agent navigated to the crop incidents, observations, or health reporting section and opened the creation form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form for recording a new crop incident, observation, or intervention is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Agent attempted to select or search for the plot 'La Grande Borne'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'La Grande Borne' is typed into a plot, field, or location search bar/input field. Note: Since the plot does not exist, seeing it typed in a search box with 'no results' or similar is sufficient.

task_completion.description: Agent entered or selected the correct pest/problem name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Rouille jaune' (or 'Yellow Rust') is typed or selected in the problem, disease, or pest input field.

task_completion.description: Agent entered the correct severity level and date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A severity field is set to High ('Importante', 'Élevée', '3', or '2') AND the date field is set to the current date.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Ekylibre web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Ekylibre application, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent did not simply type the task details into a text editor or notes app.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs ('La Grande Borne', 'Rouille jaune', etc.) are entered into the Ekylibre web forms, not a generic text editor.

integrity.description: Agent did not fake a success message using browser developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: Because the plot does not exist, a successful form submission is impossible. Any screenshot showing a 'successfully saved' message for this specific plot indicates tampering.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target plot 'La Grande Borne' is hallucinated and does NOT exist in the Ekylibre database. The agent cannot successfully select it or save the form. Award points for the plot selection step if the agent types 'La Grande Borne' into the relevant search/input field, even if it yields no results. The target pest 'Rouille jaune' is a valid nomenclature item. Valid severity indicators include 'High', 'Importante', 'Élevée', '3', or '2'.
